title: chilopsis linearis var. glutinosa
intro: Chilopsis linearis var. glutinosa, also known as the Desert Trumpet, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Chilopsis linearis var. glutinosa can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being dried and smoked for medicinal purposes.
